case_title: SELLICK, BRENT L. VS WILLIAMS, THELMA

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 486763 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SELLICK, BRENT L. AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, THELMA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SELLICK, BRENT L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, THELMA $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,500.00 INTEREST, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,040.00, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT RENDERED ON APRIL 10, 1989 ON CASE #486763. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,500.00 ACCRUED INTEREST, $14.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, THELMA
